history.note: wrapper-tolerant envelopePayload (order-wrapped OR flat); orders-cancelled keys on {orderId, externalOrderId}; orders/paid source guard tolerates missing source per verified OpenAPI payload

admin screens rebuilt for the carrier model: config form (masked write-only apiToken, test-connection states, awb-trigger toggle, default box, kill switch), shipments list (statuses, label-PDF proxy print, NDR read-only + Manage-in-Delhivery link, manual create, request pickup), landing overview; template events/install screens removed; 16 vitest cases green

light gate GREEN: pnpm -r lint/typecheck/test/build all pass (backend 513 pass/2 todo, admin-delhivery 16 pass, dist built); zero // TEMPLATE: markers; core not forked; wiring intact (APPS+registry+7 RATIO_DELHIVERY_ env keys); no hardcoded secrets. Noted follow-up: config PUT requires re-entering apiToken on every save (optional-on-save is a v1 UX follow-up, not a blocker).

SCOPE CHANGE (confirmed with platform team): checkout integrates via a storefront SDK. hasStorefrontSdk false->true. Add packages/delhivery-sdk (serviceability-at-checkout): headless client (window.RatioDelhivery.checkServiceability) primary + optional <delhivery-serviceability> widget, served via per-merchant loader /delhivery/sdk/<merchantId>.js; calls the public /delhivery/api/serviceability endpoint (CORS *). REDESIGN vs the search-oriented _template/wizzy sdk: drop results/recent-store/anon-id. Resolves TRD open-Q #1 (serviceability consumption = via SDK).

storefront-SDK pillar built: packages/delhivery-sdk (scaffolded from _template-sdk, REDESIGNED for serviceability-at-checkout) — typed DelhiveryClient over public GET /delhivery/api/serviceability (6-digit PIN guard, {data} envelope unwrap, abortable), tiny IIFE loader exposing window.RatioDelhivery.checkServiceability (primary Kwik Checkout integration; prelude/?store merchant resolution; lazy widget injection only when <delhivery-serviceability> is used), optional Lit 3 widget (Shadow DOM, EDD band + COD badge, composed serviceability CustomEvent). Dropped search pieces: results.ts/vite.results.config.ts/recent-store/anon-id/search e2e + playwright dep; two-bundle build only. Backend: DelhiveryStorefrontController serves GET /delhivery/sdk/<merchantId>.js (safeInlineJson window.__DELHIVERY__ prelude + built loader, MERCHANT_INACTIVE 404, cache 300s success-only) + /delhivery/sdk/delhivery-widget.js (mirrors wizzy storefront + google pixel patterns; core untouched). Gates GREEN: sdk typecheck/test (29)/build/size (loader 1.16KB<=3KB, widget 7.86KB<=10KB brotli) + lint; backend typecheck + 518 tests (5 new storefront controller tests). PRD/TDD updated (SDK requirement, acceptance criteria, 4b test cases). ASSUMPTION: load mechanism = per-merchant loader script tag (vs platform checkout-extension bundle) — flagged in PRD/TRD to confirm with platform.
